description_text: Product Description 4pcs Black Red Universal Car Modified Shark Fin Rear Spoiler PVC Car Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Anti-collision Add our listing to Watchlist Or Add to Cart , you will get more discount Description Condition : 100% Brand New & Unused (Quality Checked before shipping) Composition : Rear diffuser 4Pcs+Screws Great Exterior Upgrade! Color: Black/ Red Point to the buttom of the rear bumper ! Excellent exterior effect! By PVC material , It does not broken easily. It is easy install. This item is sure to improve the look of your Exterior. After the correct install steps, you will see your vehicle become more perfectly. Fit: Universal fit
